fix_summary: The booking service duplicate/conflict guard now checks for existing CONFIRMED bookings, and the targeted booking service tests pass.
approval_reasons: The implementation change is narrowly localized to the service-layer guard in backend/app/services/booking_service.py, matching the issue scope.
The guard condition was corrected from the wrong status check to BookingStatus.CONFIRMED, which aligns with the acceptance criteria.
The regression tests exercise both the confirmed-duplicate conflict path and the happy path when no confirmed booking exists.
Automated tests passed: 8 passed, confirming the change resolves the issue without breaking the targeted booking service flows.
